arts.ttl: Gary Neville aims six-word dig at Pep Guardiola after Man City draw Salford in FA Cup
arts.sum: Salford City co-owner Gary Neville sees his club travel to Manchester City for the Third Round of the FA Cup in January.

arts.ttl: Inside Pep Guardiola's greatest challenge yet as Man City plot a transfer raid amid Kevin De Bruyne mystery, writes JACK GAUGHAN
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: Pep Guardiola smiled last week as he agreed that Manchester City 's Premier League rivals would be laughing at their current demise.

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker makes Manchester City title promise despite Liverpool nightmare
arts.sum: Manchester City's hopes of winning five successive Premier League titles look all but over after Sunday's defeat at Liverpool, however England ace Kyle Walker isn't giving up hope

arts.ttl: Man City predicted lineup vs Nottingham Forest - Premier League
arts.sum: How Manchester City could line up against Nottingham Forest in Wednesday's Premier League clash.

arts.ttl: Nine arrests at Liverpool v Manchester City after reports of tragedy chanting
arts.sum: Man charged with public order offence at Anfield Kian Holt will appear before magistrates in January Nine men have been arrested following reports of tragedy chanting at the Premier League match between Liverpool and Manchester City on Sunday. Merseyside Police confirmed the nine, from Greater Manchester, Lancashire and Cheshire, were arrested at Anfield. A 28-year-old man from Prestwich was also arrested on suspicion of common assault. Kian Holt, 19, of Medlar-with-Wesham in Lancashire has been charged with a public order offence under the Football Offence Act 1991, namely tragedy chanting. He is due to appear at Sefton Magistrates Court on 8 January. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Gary Neville aims playful dig at Pep Guardiola after Salford draw struggling Man City in FA Cup
arts.sum: Third round clash will pit City against opponents co-owned by Manchester United’s ‘Class of 92’

arts.ttl: Man charged after tragedy chanting arrests at Liverpool vs Man City
arts.sum: A 19-year-old man has been charged with tragedy chanting during the Premier League match between Liverpool and Manchester City on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville can't resist mocking Pep Guardiola as Salford City land huge FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Gary Neville has kept up the "sacked in the morning" chants that were aimed at Pep Guardiola after Salford City were drawn against Manchester City in the FA Cup

arts.ttl: Man United opens FA Cup title defense at Arsenal and Man City to play 'Class of 92'-owned Salford
arts.sum: Among the best were Tamworth, one of only two non-league clubs in the draw, getting to host Tottenham and Manchester City at home to Salford City — the team owned by members of Man United’s famed “Class of 92” such as Ryan Giggs and Gary Neville. Manchester United will start its FA Cup title defense with a trip to Arsenal in a third-round draw containing a host of intriguing English Premier League vs.

arts.ttl: Why Gary Neville and Alan Shearer will be cringing at their own words after seeing Liverpool star v Man City
arts.sum: Liverpool have had some fine players over the years of the Premier League but it’s hard to argue that any have been better – defensively...
